account_reference_description: Save this account and it will be selected in the recurring item form
account_restore_description: Restore this account and select it here
category_reference_description: Save this category and it will be selected in the recurring item form
category_restore_description: Restore this category and select it here
empty_date_range_description: Pick another day or range in the header to inspect recurring items due during {filter}
empty_date_range_title: No recurring items in this date range
empty_description: Add your regular bills or expected income so upcoming money movements stay visible before they hit your account history
end_date_description: Leave blank to keep this rule active
error_end_date_after_due: The end date must be on or after the next due date
error_first_due_date_after_start: The first due date must be on or after the start date
error_no_account: Add at least one active account before scheduling a recurring item
error_no_category: Create at least one category in Settings before saving this recurring item
form_create_category_hint: You can create a category directly from the category field if you need a new one
form_description: Schedule future income or expenses so due dates stay visible before you need to record the actual transaction
prerequisite_account_description: Recurring bills and paychecks need an account so every future money movement points somewhere real
prerequisite_account_title: Add an account before scheduling recurring items
prerequisite_category_description: Recurring rules need income or expense categories so upcoming paychecks and bills stay organized when you confirm them
prerequisite_category_title: Create a category before adding recurring items
